source: Outputs/readout_html/necromancer_readout.html's --accent CSS variable, cross-confirmed against Outputs/class_sheets/ability_sheets_all_classes.html's embedded per-class JSON. Part of an already-established per-class accent system covering all 21 classes (spot-checked: Reaper #0a876b, Pyromancer #ff6112, Chronomancer #ffed4a all differ) - not invented for this folder.
accent_rgba_note: 0-1 float conversion of accent_hex (45/db/9c / 255), ready to plug directly into a WeakAuras color field (e.g. a Class Accent icon's 'color', or an aurabar's 'barColor') - no manual hex-to-float conversion needed at fill time.
usage: Class Accent Left/Right icons (Template_shadow.py's Row C.5, currently generic placeholders)
Any Necromancer-specific aurabar's barColor, if a class-tinted resource bar is ever wanted over the default red/white scheme
subglow's glowColor, if a class-tinted proc glow is ever wanted over the default white
